text:
Created attachment 256206
www/py-videomass.patch

Videomass is a free and open-source graphical user interface (GUI) for FFmpeg
and yt-dlp. It is designed for both advanced and beginner users, providing a
powerful, multitasking environment. With a wide range of features, Videomass
simplifies video processing tasks across multiple platforms.

WWW:	https://github.com/jeanslack/Videomass \
	https://pypi.org/project/videomass

Thanks in advance and happy new year!
